en_body:
Grant me a humble thought,
To greet new Love
softly tiptoeing in.
Grant me a lovely Imagination,
To bring Love
sorrow-deep
and bind it into ringing sound.
Grant me remembrance enduring,
To welcome You
into the first young leaf-bud of season.
Grant me to sit silent in my place,
Longing
deep and full
for the fragrant laughter of Someone.
note: The repeated prayer-like "Grant me" turns romantic happiness into a quiet devotional practice.
